chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-4832 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to maintainability of Petition. 09.02.2026. Mr. K. A. Vaswani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Ms. Rabia Saqib, Assistant Prosecutor General, Sindh. ------- No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner and no intimation has been received. A perusal of the Order Sheet reflects that this was also the case on the previous date. Under such circumstances, it appears that the Petitioner has lost interest in the Petition, which stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
